title: Section 5
content: (1) No one shall produce, refine or blend petroleum save in accordance with the rules made under sub-section (2). (2) The 1[Central Government] may makes rules-- (a) prescribing the conditions subject to which petroleum may be produced, refined or blended; and (b) regulating the removal of petroleum from places where it is produced, refined or blended and preventing the storage therein and removal therefrom, except as 2[petroleum Class A], of any petroleum, which has not satisfied the prescribed tests. 3* * * * *
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1937, for "Governor-General-in-Council". 2. Subs. by Act 24 of 1970, s. 6, for "dangerous petroleum" (w.e.f. 1-8-1976). 3. Sub-section (3) omitted by the A.O. 1937.
